The '''Teyan Praxeum''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Praxeum|praxeum]] located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Teya IV]].

The praxeum was founded around [[4600 BBY]] by a group of Jedi. In [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]], Mistress [[Tannis (Jedi)|Tannis]] taught [[Vici Ramunee]] and [[Veni Ramunee]] at the praxeum.

Jedi Master [[Simikarty]] wrote his ''[[Teyan Apologia]]'' at the praxeum.

{{Loc-stub}}
